title: Blocks Fight Back
description: 2.0 wasn't good enough for the blocks to be sentient. Now they will have revenge after you've broken so many!
body:
I don't really like creating server plugins. So instead, I made the playable challenge a mod. Hope you enjoy!


<details>
<summary>Special Block Functionalities</summary>

Blocks that are too durable are classified as bosses. 

The beacon is a boss that turns the blocks under it into sentient blocks and will summon blocks that aren't too strong.

Any block (Including modded ones) that has the word "spawner" in its name, will summon any mob, even modded ones that have health that is 8 or less.

</details>
